title: GHRSST Validation Protocol Document (VPD)
author: Corlett, Gary
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Validation of GHRSST SST products is essential to provide users with confidence in their content. This document summarises the procedures agreed upon by the GHRSST International Science Team to ensure commonality of methods across the GHRSST community.
steps_raw: Validation of GHRSST SST products is essential to provide users with confidence in their content. This document summarises the procedures agreed upon by the GHRSST International Science Team to ensure commonality of methods across the GHRSST community.
